use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and landing pages
Secondary actions with outline or ghost variants
Icon buttons for toolbar and navigation interfaces
Destructive action buttons with warning styling
Keyboard-accessible buttons with focus ring indicators
ai_summary: A flexible atomic Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features accessible focus states, disabled handling, and composition support via asChild prop. Ships only the Button component without the referenced Footer demo.
